nasb.text: Of the three in the second rank he was the most honored and became their commander; however, he did not attain to the first three.

esv.text: He was the most renowned of the thirty and became their commander, but he did not attain to the three.

cnv.text: 他在這三個勇士中，是最尊貴的，所以作他們的首領；只是還不及前三個勇士。

ccb.text: 最有声望，因此做了他们的统领，只是不及前三位勇士。
